languages.text: "Выходит, правильно капитан-интендант говорила, мол, надо искать новые способы служения Богу-Императору, а не только старые до дыр затирать..."
"Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."
languages.original_text: "Выходит, правильно капитан-интендант говорила, мол, надо искать новые способы служения Богу-Императору, а не только старые до дыр затирать..."

traits.locale_text: "It turns out the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."
"It turns out the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."
"Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."
"Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."
"Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."

languages.text: “也许军需官上尉是对的——我们该找些新法子来侍奉神皇，而不是一味死守老一套……”
languages.original_text: "Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."

traits.locale_text: “也许军需官上尉是对的——我们该找些新法子来侍奉神皇，而不是一味死守老一套……”

languages.text: "Belki de Levazımcı Yüzbaşı haklıydı... Sadece eskilere sarılmak yerine Tanrı İmparator'a hizmet etmenin yeni yollarını bulmalıyız..."
languages.original_text: "Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."

traits.locale_text: "Belki de Levazımcı Yüzbaşı haklıydı... Sadece eskilere sarılmak yerine Tanrı İmparator'a hizmet etmenin yeni yollarını bulmalıyız..."

languages.text: « Je commence à me dire que la capitaine-quartier-maître a raison. Nous devrions peut-être trouver de nouvelles façons de servir l'Empereur-Dieu, au lieu de nous raccrocher aux vieilles traditions... »
languages.original_text: "Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."

traits.locale_text: « Je commence à me dire que la capitaine-quartier-maître a raison. Nous devrions peut-être trouver de nouvelles façons de servir l'Empereur-Dieu, au lieu de nous raccrocher aux vieilles traditions... »

languages.text: «Puede que la capitana intendente tuviera razón: quizá deberíamos buscar nuevas formas de servir al Dios Emperador en lugar de aferrarnos a las que conocemos...».
languages.original_text: "Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."

traits.locale_text: «Puede que la capitana intendente tuviera razón: quizá deberíamos buscar nuevas formas de servir al Dios Emperador en lugar de aferrarnos a las que conocemos...».

languages.text: "Vielleicht hatte die Captain-Quartiermeisterin recht ... wir sollten neue Wege finden, dem Gottimperator zu dienen, anstatt an den alten festzuhalten ..."
languages.original_text: "Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."

traits.locale_text: "Vielleicht hatte die Captain-Quartiermeisterin recht ... wir sollten neue Wege finden, dem Gottimperator zu dienen, anstatt an den alten festzuhalten ..."

languages.text: 「もしかしたら、艦長兼大尉は正しいかもしれない。旧来の信仰に固執するのではなく、新たな信仰の道を見つけるべきだ…」
languages.original_text: "Maybe the captain-quartermaster was right — we should find new ways to serve the God-Emperor, instead of just clinging to the old ones..."

traits.locale_text: 「もしかしたら、艦長兼大尉は正しいかもしれない。旧来の信仰に固執するのではなく、新たな信仰の道を見つけるべきだ…」
